title: Regional Marketing Lead Italy, UK, Nordics
description:
**Vacancy Name**

 Regional Marketing Lead Italy, UK, Nordics  

**Location of Work**

 Rome, Italy  

**Employment Type**

 Full Time Employee  

**Job Description**

**Our mission**  

At Corza Medical, our mission is to champion surgical providers with remarkable service and exceptional products that save time, money, and effort. We are a passionate team guided by our core belief that you should never have to choose between performance, value, and a quality customer experience. We are here to support you every step of the way.  

  

**Our brand promise**  

We deliver a collaborative experience by working directly with the surgical community to ensure you get the exact surgical tools you need at the right time and the right price.
* **Remarkable service:** A seamless, personal process designed around you and your needs.
* **Trusted performance:** Our product family is the result of years of experience championing surgeons and listening to their expertise.
* **Outstanding value:** No matter the surgical specialty, we deliver quality products for all markets.


**Our people promise**  

Excellence is our Specialty and what makes us successful is our people. We are committed to fostering a positive, empowering and growth\-oriented environment where all team members are encouraged to share their opinions and ideas. That means you will work alongside an accomplished and highly collaborative team that inspires commitment to our goal in attaining excellence in everything they do.  

  

**Job Purpose Summary**  

The Regional Marketing Lead will be driving the go\-to\-market strategy, commercialization, and lifecycle management of products for the Region (Italy, UK \& Nordics). This role is critical in ensuring that the company’s products meet market needs, drive sales, and comply with regulatory standards while enhancing customer satisfaction. This role will work closely with medical, sales, customer service, and cross\-functional teams to ensure effective product launches, market positioning, and ongoing product performance. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in product management, market \& competitive analysis, with experience in the pharma or medical device industry.  

  

**What you will do**
* **Strategy**: Develop and execute regional marketing brand plan to support the company’s long term growth initiatives, partnering closely with regional commercial \& marketing teams.
* **Expertise**: Acquire deep knowledge in Biosurgery products \& its competitors \- Monitor competitive landscape closely \& implement strong competitive strategies to differentiate our product’s value proposition in the market and defend high market shares.
* **Campaigns Launch:** Lead the implementation of global campaigns partnering closely with cross\-functional leads (internal/external) while maintaining brand’s visual identity and marketing spend effectiveness.
* **Marketing Technology Experience:** Management, roll\-out and continuous improvement of marketing technologies, including CRM platforms (e.g., Salesforce), Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Medical Marketing content management platforms (e.g. Seismic, Medtube, etc) and other related technologies.
* **Training Management:** Develop a strong \& competitive HCP training program for training \& workshops on the Biosurgery portfolio and implement in the region partnering with the regional MSL and Medical Affairs.
* Conceptualize, prepare, moderate training \& workshops program for commercial teams regionally with a variety of senior stakeholders to ensure a strong onboarding for new joiners and refreshers for experience sales team on Marketing collateral and technology tools


  

**What you will need**
* 3\-6 years’ experience in local or regional marketing \& product management positions in the pharmaceutical/MedTech industry with working knowledge in the Operating Room and consumables
* Desirable to have 2\-4 years expertise in Biosurgery area, experience working with haemostats preferred.
* Strong Marketing/ product management experience (downstream) – Demand generation, product positioning, marketing campaigns, KOL relationship, competitive intelligence
* Great knowledge of the Italian Market; European experience desirable
* Strong experience in CRM (Salesforce) analysis, Marketing cloud, sales enablement platform like Seismic etc, Excel and other Microsoft applications
* Ability to drive change, engage with the region, work collaboratively and cross\-functionally in a fast\-paced, international matrix environment
* Proven ability to deliver against expected outcomes leading complex, cross\-organizational initiatives.
* University Degree, Marketing or another relevant field, Master’s Degree preferred
* Must be fluent in Italian and English (oral and written)
* Ability to travel up to 10 % internationally and 20% nationally


  

**What we value**
* **Customer First** \- We deliver extraordinary experiences.
* **Accountability** \- We do what we say.
* **Integrity** \- We do what is right.
* **Inspired** \- We love what we do.
* **One Global Team** \-We before me, always.


Join us today and **Excel@Corza**!  

  

***Corza Medical is an equal opportunity employer. Corza Medical evaluates qualified applicants without regard to race, color, marital status, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, national origin, physical or mental disability, veteran status or other protected characteristics.***

title: Clinical Operations Manager (Start-Up)
description:
**Company Description** **About AbbVie**


AbbVie's mission is to discover and deliver innovative medicines and solutions that solve serious health issues today and address the medical challenges of tomorrow. We strive to have a remarkable impact on people's lives across several key therapeutic areas including immunology, oncology and neuroscience \- and products and services in our Allergan Aesthetics portfolio. For more information about AbbVie, please visit us at www.abbvie.com. Follow @abbvie on LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, X and YouTube.

 **Job Description**  

We are looking for a **Clinical Operations Manager (Start\-Up)** to join our Clinical Site Management team, reporting directly to the Country Clinical Operations Head.

**Scope**


The Clinical Operations Manager (COM, Start\-Up) leads the start\-up and maintenance of clinical studies in the country, ensuring timely, high\-quality site activation and study delivery.


They will manage and develop the CSSUS team, act as the primary point of accountability for site activities, and foster strong relationships with research sites and stakeholders. The COM drives continuous improvement and positions AbbVie as the preferred partner in clinical research.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Lead, resource, hire, and develop the CSSUS team.
* Oversee and implement site activation and maintenance plans, including risk management.
* Ensure execution and quality of all SSU/site activities, adhering to regulations and budgets.
* Monitor and report site/country intelligence and study start\-up metrics.
* Maintain compliance with global/local guidelines and ensure audit readiness.
* Foster collaboration and effective communication internally and externally.
* Identify staff training needs and support onboarding and process enhancements.
* Proactively manage risks, drive quality management, and contribute to process improvement.
* Oversee study budgets and resources and ensure strategic alignment with business goals

  

**Qualifications**  

* Bachelor’s degree in Health Care/Scientific field
* Over 5 years of clinical research experience, with specific experience in managing study start up
* Preferred previous line management experience
* Led cross\-functional, global and virtual teams; demonstrated stakeholder influence and alignment; modeled AbbVie leadership principles
* Ability to work autonomously; minimal oversight required
* Strong analytical and critical thinking; expert at evaluating complex issues and driving sound decisions
* Trusted communicator with persuasive, clear, and adaptable interpersonal style
* Successfully executed programs (including start\-ups), managed multiple priorities in fast\-paced settings
* Actively contributed to business initiatives and special projects
* Advanced knowledge of ICH and GCP guidelines and deep understanding of global clinical regulatory requirements
* Fluent in Italian and English

  

**Additional Information**  

AbbVie is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to operating with integrity, driving innovation, transforming lives and serving our community. Equal Opportunity Employer/Veterans/Disabled.


US \& Puerto Rico only \- to learn more, visit https://www.abbvie.com/join\-us/equal\-employment\-opportunity\-employer.html


US \& Puerto Rico applicants seeking a reasonable accommodation, click here to learn more:


https://www.abbvie.com/join\-us/reasonable\-accommodations.html

title: Product Manager
description:
Work Your Magic with us!

  

Ready to explore, break barriers, and discover more? We know you’ve got big plans – so do we! Our colleagues across the globe love innovating with science and technology to enrich people’s lives with our solutions in Healthcare, Life Science, and Electronics. Together, we dream big and are passionate about caring for our rich mix of people, customers, patients, and planet. That's why we are always looking for curious minds that see themselves imagining the unimaginable with us.

  

United As One for Patients, our purpose in Healthcare is to help create, improve and prolong lives. We develop medicines, intelligent devices and innovative technologies in therapeutic areas such as Oncology, Neurology and Fertility. Our teams work together across 6 continents with passion and relentless curiosity in order to help patients at every stage of life. Joining our Healthcare team is becoming part of a diverse, inclusive and flexible working culture, presenting great opportunities for personal development and career advancement across the globe.

 **Your role:**


As a Product Manager in the Oncology Sector, you will own the end\-to\-end lifecycle of our brand. You are responsible for architecting and executing integrated marketing strategies that bridge digital and traditional channels while ensuring local messaging remains globally aligned. You will support the product's successful market positioning, guided by rigorous market research and competitive analysis to identify growth opportunities. You will collaborate deeply with the Sales, Market Access, and Medical departments to develop high\-impact promotional initiatives. In addition to developing the multi\-year strategic plan and managing the budget, you will lead our presence at major annual congresses. Using your expertise in data analytics, you will monitor campaign performance and spend, adjusting tactics in real\-time to drive results while maintaining strict regulatory compliance.

  



**Who are you:**

* 5\+ years in pharmaceutical marketing, the focus on Oncology sector will be considered a plus.
* Deeply knowledgeable about local healthcare systems and market access trends.
* Proficient in data management and digital analytics to optimize brand performance.
* Strong scientific acumen to partner with Medical and Sales teams effectively.
* Exceptional at managing complex workflows, budgets, and congress planning.
* High\-level presentation skills with fluency in English

 **What we offer:** We are curious minds that come from a broad range of backgrounds, perspectives, and life experiences. We believe that this variety drives excellence and innovation, strengthening our ability to lead in science and technology. We are committed to creating access and opportunities for all to develop and grow at your own pace. Join us in building a culture of inclusion and belonging that impacts millions and empowers everyone to work their magic and champion human progress!

  

Apply now and become a part of a team that is dedicated to Sparking Discovery and Elevating Humanity!

title: Regulatory Affairs manager & Affiliate Quality - Maternity Cover
Pricing Analyst - Shockwave
description:
At Johnson \& Johnson, we believe health is everything. Our strength in healthcare innovation empowers us to build a world where complex diseases are prevented, treated, and cured, where treatments are smarter and less invasive, and solutions are personal. Through our expertise in Innovative Medicine and MedTech, we are uniquely positioned to innovate across the full spectrum of healthcare solutions today to deliver the breakthroughs of tomorrow, and profoundly impact health for humanity. Learn more at jnj.com.


As guided by Our Credo, Johnson \& Johnson is responsible to our employees who work with us throughout the world. We provide an inclusive work environment where each person is considered as an individual. At Johnson \& Johnson, we respect the diversity and dignity of our employees and recognize their merit.

**Job Function:**

Sales Enablement**Job Sub Function:**

Sales Strategy**Job Category:**


Professional**All Job Posting Locations:**


Pomezia, Roma, Italy**Job Description:**


Johnson \& Johnson is recruiting for Shockwave Medical Inc. a Pricing Analyst, to be located in Italy.

**AboutMedTech**


Fueled by innovation at the intersection of biology and technology, we’re developing the next generation of smarter, less invasive, more personalized treatments. Ready to join a team that’s pioneering the development and commercialization of Intravascular Lithotripsy (IVL) to treat complex calcified cardiovascular disease? Our Shockwave Medical portfolio aims to establish a new standard of care for medical device treatment of atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease through its differentiated and proprietary local delivery of sonic pressure waves for the treatment of calcified plaque.

 **Position Overview**

  

The Pricing Analyst is responsible for supporting pricing strategy development, analysing market trends, making competitive and data\-driven pricing recommendations, and monitoring compliance with contract terms. This role will focus on optimizing pricing models, reviewing current pricing systems and making recommendations for technical and process improvements, tracking key pricing and contracts metrics, and collaborating with cross\-functional teams to ensure alignment between pricing strategies and business objectives. The Pricing Analyst will play a key role in forecasting revenue impact, maintaining pricing and contract databases, and improving overall pricing efficiency.

 **Essential Job Functions**

* Provide pricing support by analysing competitive data, reimbursement trends, and pricing strategies.
* Develop and maintain pricing and contract dashboards and reports to track key performance indicators (KPIs) for pricing and revenue optimization.
* Collaborate with the Sales, Strategic Accounts, Finance, and Market Access teams to align data\-driven pricing insights with strategic business objectives.
* Support pricing governance by ensuring compliance with company policies and regulatory requirements.
* Assist in developing market segmentation and pricing models to enhance revenue growth.
* Conduct reimbursement and contract analysis to assess compliance with contract terms and to assess trends and support pricing decisions.
* Work with IT and Business Intelligence teams to improve pricing data integration and reporting automation.
* Conduct competitor and market analysis to provide insights into industry pricing trends.
* Support pricing strategy formulation by analyzing pricing elasticity, profitability, and customer pricing preferences.
* Assist in budgeting and forecasting by analyzing pricing impact and revenue projections.
* Maintain a pricing database and tracker to monitor and report on pricing initiatives and contract performance.
* Ensure compliance with data privacy regulations and company standards for pricing analytics.
* This role is fully remote. Travel up to 20% may be required for business meetings, conferences, and team collaboration.

**Required Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Finance, Economics, Data Science, or a related field, or equivalent experience
* 2\+ years of experience in pricing analysis, financial modeling, or commercial operations, preferably within Medical Device, MedTech, or Pharmaceutical industries
* Strong analytical skills with hands‑on experience in pricing analytics, data visualization, and reporting automation
* Proficiency in data analysis tools and ERP/CRM systems (e.g., SAP, Salesforce, Power BI, Tableau, Looker)
* Experience using SQL, Excel, or other data querying tools for analysis
* Solid understanding of pricing strategies and contract pricing models
* Strong communication and problem‑solving skills, with the ability to present insights to cross‑functional stakeholders
* Proven ability to collaborate effectively with Sales, Finance, and Market Access teams

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Experience with value‑based pricing models and risk‑sharing agreements
* Familiarity with contract compliance analysis and reporting
* Experience with pricing automation tools and AI‑driven pricing optimization
* Hands‑on experience with pricing systems, making technical process improvement recommendations, and supporting system implementation efforts

**Required Skills:**

**Preferred Skills:**


Analytical Reasoning, Brand Positioning Strategy, Business Behavior, Coaching, Competitive Landscape Analysis, Cross\-Functional Collaboration, Customer Centricity, Customer Experience Management, Market Research, Presentation Design, Problem Solving, Product Knowledge, Sales Enablement, Sales Support, Solutions Selling, Strategic Sales Planning

title: Stage nel dipartimento di Ricerca Clinica
description:
Job Description

**Luogo**: Roma

**Modalità**: Ibrida

**Rimborso spese:** €800,oo lordi al mese

**Durata**: Lo stage verrà strutturato su un periodo di 12 mesi.


Stage iniziale di 6 mesi con possibilità di rinnovo di altri 6 mesi. La possibilità di attivare anche uno stage curricolare costituisce un elemento preferenziale.


Il paziente è al centro di tutto ciò che facciamo, motivo per cui i nostri team si concentrano sulla ricerca di soluzioni e trattamenti per alcune delle malattie più difficili del mondo. Il candidato verrà inserito nel nostro dipartimento a supporto dell’attività lavorativa.


Il profilo del candidato verrà inserito in un percorso formativo in accordo al suo background di studi e le aspirazioni professionali grazie al quale potrà accrescere le proprie competenze professionali collaborando attivamente con tutto il team.


L’**Obiettivo** principale dello stage è fornire al Tirocinante le competenze necessarie per garantire un corretto e completo svolgimento delle attività richieste per l’attivazione e la successiva conduzione degli studi clinici nell’ambito della sperimentazione clinica dei medicinali.

**Attività del progetto formativo:**

* ***Percorso Finanziario/Amministrativo***:
	+ Supporto ai team che si occupano della negoziazione del budget e della redazione dei contratti per gli studi clinici
	+ Supporto al team che si occupa della gestione dei pagamenti delle attività svolte durante l’esecuzione dello studio clinico
	+ Aggiornamento tracker locali
	+ Archiviazione cartacea/elettronica della documentazione

**Profilo:**

* Provenienza da studi di laurea in discipline scientifiche/laurea in economia (per percorso finanziario/amministrativo).
* Partecipazione Master in Ricerca Clinica o affini.
* Buon uso del PC, pacchetti Office: Word, Excel, Posta Elettronica.
* Conoscenza della lingua inglese.
* Buone doti analitiche, precisione e organizzazione, proattività e problem solving, ottime capacità relazionali e autonomia nel portare a termine compiti assegnati.
* Propensione al lavoro in team
* Flessibilità e dinamicità.

**Required Skills:**

Analytical Problem Solving, Analytical Problem Solving, Clinical Medicine, Clinical Pharmacy, Clinical Research, Clinical Trials, Clinical Trials Analysis, Clinical Trials Monitoring, Data Analytics, Database Management, Data Entry, Data Visualization, Document Management, Early Clinical Development, Health Economics, Language Assessments, Office Applications, Payment Handling, Pharmaceutical Testing, Pharmacogenetics, Process Improvements, Project Management, Reporting and Analysis, Researching, Technical Support {\+ 1 more}**Preferred Skills:**
